layer_B.loss_advantage_test: grammar wins even with 10x loss advantage to mode 1

verdict: Grammar-forced mode selection confirmed numerically. Mode 7 (HAR) wins with grammar coupling even with uniform loss. Mode 7 at λ=0.30 (CHA): 75% — matches TIG gamma=0.75 exactly. {3,9} orbit transient occurs before M7 dominance. Only 3 coupling links needed to maintain M7 dominance. Noise tolerance: ε*≈0.03 (coupling perturbations below 3% safe).
